name: Carve With Empty Pointing Production
description: Foo{->} — open carve, then a Product (-> with no left side, no right operand). UNCERTAIN: parse_pointing_push as prefix would parse a left-less pointing as Product(nil)? Per other tests, '-> x' yields Product(x). With nothing after '->', the Product target is nil. Best guess: Carve(Foo,[]) — Product is dropped because target is missing.
